Package com.intergral.fusionreactor.api

Interface ITransactionSurrogate

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IFusionRequestSurrogate

    public interface ITransactionSurrogate
    This type encapsulates a transaction, providing access to the transaction info, regardless of transaction flavor/type.
    Since:
    2026.1.2

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      String getApplicationName​()  
      ITransactionSurrogate getDeepestActiveChild​()  
      String getDescription​()  
      ITransactionSurrogate[] getDirectChildren​()  
      long getDuration​()  
      long getDurationNanos​()  
      long getEndTime​()  
      long getEndTimeNanos​()  
      String getFlavor​()  
      String getFullTransactionId​()
      Gets the complete transaction identifier, which is unique between domains, sessions and transactions.
      ITransactionSurrogate getMasterTransaction​()  
      ITransactionSurrogate getParentTransaction​()  
      long getPerFlavorTransactionId​()
      Get the per-flavor ID of this transaction.
      Map<String,Object> getProperties​()  
      String getSampledState​()  
      String getSecureDescription​()  
      String getSpanId​()  
      long getStartTime​()  
      long getStartTimeNanos​()  
      String getStatus​()
      Possible values: "Waiting" - The transaction has been created but not yet opened "Open" - transaction is currently active "Opening" "Rejected" - The transaction was rejected by a transaction gate decision and should not have started. "Timed Out" - The transaction timed out and was closed. "Finished" - The transaction was closed by API. "Kill Pending" - The transaction is in the process of being killed. "Kill Failed" - The transaction could not be killed, or has not yet died. "Soft Killed" - The transaction was killed by API. "Killed" - The transaction was killed by API. "Cascade Closed" - Parent transaction was closed causing this transaction to be closed too.
      String getSubFlavor​()  
      long getThreadId​()  
      String getThreadName​()  
      String getTraceId​()  
      long getTransactionId​()
      Get the ID of this transaction.
      String getTransactionName​()  
      Throwable getTrappedThrowable​()  
      boolean hasChildren​()  
      boolean isFinished​()  
      boolean isInError​()  
      boolean isMasterTransaction​()  
      boolean isSampled​()
      Effectively, isSampled() == getSampledState() != "UNSAMPLED"

    • Method Detail

      • getDescription

        String getDescription​()
        Returns:
        the description of this transaction. Is null if not set
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getSecureDescription

        String getSecureDescription​()
        Returns:
        obfuscated description of this transaction. Is null if not set
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getApplicationName

        String getApplicationName​()
        Returns:
        the application name of this transaction. Default is MyApplication.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getTransactionName

        String getTransactionName​()
        Returns:
        the transaction name of this transaction.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getFlavor

        String getFlavor​()
        Returns:
        the flavor of this transaction. e.g. WebRequest, JDBCRequest, etc.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getSubFlavor

        String getSubFlavor​()
        Returns:
        the sub-flavor of this transaction. e.g. HTTP request methods, SQL commands, etc.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getFullTransactionId

        String getFullTransactionId​()
        Gets the complete transaction identifier, which is unique between domains, sessions and transactions. This is cached as a String, containing DOMAIN-ID/SESSION-ID/TRANSACTION-ID
        Returns:
        the full transaction ID of this request.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getTransactionId

        long getTransactionId​()
        Get the ID of this transaction. This is an incrementing long value, which wraps to 1 when Long.MAX_VALUE is reached.
        Returns:
        the transaction ID of this request.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getPerFlavorTransactionId

        long getPerFlavorTransactionId​()
        Get the per-flavor ID of this transaction. These are incremented on a per-flavor basis. This value wraps to 1 when Long.MAX_VALUE is exceeded.
        Returns:
        the per-flavor, transaction ID of this request.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getStartTime

        long getStartTime​()
        Returns:
        the epoch start time of the transaction, to millisecond accuracy.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getStartTimeNanos

        long getStartTimeNanos​()
        Returns:
        the value of System.nanoTime() at the time the transaction was started.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getEndTime

        long getEndTime​()
        Returns:
        the epoch end time of the transaction, to millisecond accuracy. -1 if the transaction's not finished.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getEndTimeNanos

        long getEndTimeNanos​()
        Returns:
        the value of System.nanoTime() at the time the transaction was ended. -1 if the transaction's not finished.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getDuration

        long getDuration​()
        Returns:
        the duration of the transaction in millis, using the system timer.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getDurationNanos

        long getDurationNanos​()
        Returns:
        the duration of the transaction in nanos using the system timer.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getProperties

        Map<String,Object> getProperties​()
        Returns:
        a map of any properties associated with the transaction
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getMasterTransaction

        ITransactionSurrogate getMasterTransaction​()
        Returns:
        the root/master transaction of this transaction. null if this is the root transaction.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getParentTransaction

        ITransactionSurrogate getParentTransaction​()
        Returns:
        the parent transaction of this transaction. null if this is the root transaction.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getDeepestActiveChild

        ITransactionSurrogate getDeepestActiveChild​()
        Returns:
        the deepest active child transaction of this transaction. null if no deepest active child. May also return this transaction.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getDirectChildren

        ITransactionSurrogate[] getDirectChildren​()
        Returns:
        an array of the direct children of this transaction. Empty if no children.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • hasChildren

        boolean hasChildren​()
        Returns:
        true if this transaction has any children, false otherwise.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • isMasterTransaction

        boolean isMasterTransaction​()
        Returns:
        true if this transaction is the master/root transaction, false otherwise.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getStatus

        String getStatus​()
        Possible values:
        • "Waiting" - The transaction has been created but not yet opened
        • "Open" - transaction is currently active
        • "Opening"
        • "Rejected" - The transaction was rejected by a transaction gate decision and should not have started.
        • "Timed Out" - The transaction timed out and was closed.
        • "Finished" - The transaction was closed by API.
        • "Kill Pending" - The transaction is in the process of being killed.
        • "Kill Failed" - The transaction could not be killed, or has not yet died.
        • "Soft Killed" - The transaction was killed by API.
        • "Killed" - The transaction was killed by API.
        • "Cascade Closed" - Parent transaction was closed causing this transaction to be closed too.
        Returns:
        status of this transaction.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getThreadId

        long getThreadId​()
        Returns:
        the ID of the thread that this transaction is/was active.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getThreadName

        String getThreadName​()
        Returns:
        the name of the thread that this transaction is/was active.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • isFinished

        boolean isFinished​()
        Returns:
        true if this transaction is finished, false otherwise.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • isInError

        boolean isInError​()
        Returns:
        true if this transaction is flagged as being in a state of error, false otherwise.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getTrappedThrowable

        Throwable getTrappedThrowable​()
        Returns:
        the last captured Throwable that is associated with this transaction. null if no error was trapped.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getTraceId

        String getTraceId​()
        Returns:
        the trace ID of this request.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getSpanId

        String getSpanId​()
        Returns:
        the span ID of this request.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getSampledState

        String getSampledState​()
        Returns:
        the span sample state of this request. One of UNSAMPLED, SAMPLED, UNSAMPLED_ITT
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • isSampled

        boolean isSampled​()
        Effectively, isSampled() == getSampledState() != "UNSAMPLED"
        Returns:
        true if this transaction is sampled, to be exported as a trace span, false otherwise.
        Since:
        2026.1.2
